Patriots Day Justice Rally – Monday, April 20

📅 Save the Date
Monday, April 20 • 11 AM – 1 PM
1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA

Join us for a special Patriots Day Justice Rally at the ICE detention center at 1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA.

Bring your flag! Bring your revolutionary spirit!

Volunteers Needed

  • Carpool drivers
  • Marshals
  • Setup

Registration

Registration for this event on mobilize.us is in progress. In the meantime, email info@fixice.org.

Parking and Public Transportation

There is no public parking nearby and they actively tow on District Ave and the side lots. Email info@fixice.org for information on carpooling from a nearby lot or public transportation.

To volunteer, add yourself to the email list, or for questions, email ethanstrominger2@gmail.com
